lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What big problem did Hannah have?
answers: She was unable to have children

questions.text: What promise did Hannah make to God?
answers: If God gave her a son, she would give him back to serve Him
She would give away all her money

questions.text: What did Eli think when he saw Hannah praying silently?
answers: He thought she had a demon

questions.text: What did Eli say to Hannah?
answers: May God give you what you ask for
God will never answer your prayer
Pray louder so I can hear you

questions.text: What happened after Hannah returned home?
answers: He forgot all about her promise

questions.text: What did Hannah name her baby?
When Samuel was old enough, what did Hannah do?
answers: Brought him to serve with Eli at the Tabernacle
Tried to hide him from God

questions.text: What did Hannah do each year?
answers: Visited Samuel and brought him a robe she made
Begged Samuel to come back home

questions.text: What prayer of blessing did Eli pray for Hannah?
answers: That God would give her more children
That she would leave Samuel alone
That she would never be sad again

questions.text: How many more children did God give to Hannah?
